records.m_Talk_ENG: Huah...! That's all of them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huah...! That's all of them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huah...! That's all of them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As expected, the quarantine room is empty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As expected, the quarantine room is empty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As expected, the quarantine room is empty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if we thought the kid would stay in here, we wouldn't have come up with such a bothersome plan in the first place...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if we thought the kid would stay in here, we wouldn't have come up with such a bothersome plan in the first place...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if we thought the kid would stay in here, we wouldn't have come up with such a bothersome plan in the first place...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I guess I can leave the rest to her, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I guess I can leave the rest to her, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I guess I can leave the rest to her, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sniff* *Sniff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sniff* *Sniff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sniff* *Sniff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Blech! How much blood did I spill? I could go for a shower about now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Blech! How much blood did I spill? I could go for a shower about now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Blech! How much blood did I spill? I could go for a shower about now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh! There's a shower right there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh! There's a shower right there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh! There's a shower right there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ptui...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ptui...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ptui...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The water's all rusted. Ugh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The water's all rusted. Ugh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The water's all rusted. Ugh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sensor isn't picking up any movement.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sensor isn't picking up any movement.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sensor isn't picking up any movement.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe the <color=#ffd34c>home</color> Shepherd mentioned isn't here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe the <color=#ffd34c>home</color> Shepherd mentioned isn't here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe the <color=#ffd34c>home</color> Shepherd mentioned isn't here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something's covering up camera 15.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something's covering up camera 15.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something's covering up camera 15.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I can't see it through the camera, I'll have to go see it in person.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I can't see it through the camera, I'll have to go see it in person.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I can't see it through the camera, I'll have to go see it in person.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That sound... Is it coming from down the aisle?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That sound... Is it coming from down the aisle?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That sound... Is it coming from down the aisle?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I remember that sound. I heard it in the dark when the Diving Bell went down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I remember that sound. I heard it in the dark when the Diving Bell went down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I remember that sound. I heard it in the dark when the Diving Bell went down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is it coming this way?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is it coming this way?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is it coming this way?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Spencer!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Spencer!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Spencer!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We gotta run! That troublesome C.O. is headed this way!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We gotta run! That troublesome C.O. is headed this way!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We gotta run! That troublesome C.O. is headed this way!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yanikka?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yanikka?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yanikka?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Run? But where to?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Run? But where to?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Run? But where to?

records.m_Talk_ENG: As far from here as possible! And after you lose <color=#ffd34c>it</color>, go find that Shepherd girl!
records.m_Talk_DEU: As far from here as possible! And after you lose <color=#ffd34c>it</color>, go find that Shepherd girl!
records.m_Talk_FRA: As far from here as possible! And after you lose <color=#ffd34c>it</color>, go find that Shepherd girl!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We need her to stop <color=#ffd34c>it</color>!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We need her to stop <color=#ffd34c>it</color>!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We need her to stop <color=#ffd34c>it</color>!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you talking about whatever made that odd noise?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you talking about whatever made that odd noise?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you talking about whatever made that odd noise?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the master key I found in the quarantine room.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the master key I found in the quarantine room.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the master key I found in the quarantine room.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Take it, Spencer, and run far away from here! I'll buy you some time!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Take it, Spencer, and run far away from here! I'll buy you some time!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Take it, Spencer, and run far away from here! I'll buy you some time!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Buy me some time? Wouldn't it be better to go togeth
8g!

Buy me some time? Wouldn't it be better to go togeth
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Buy me some time? Wouldn't it be better to go togeth
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh?! The gate just blasted open?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh?! The gate just blasted open?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh?! The gate just blasted open?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That giant machine... is a C.O.?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That giant machine... is a C.O.?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That giant machine... is a C.O.?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Go! NOW! Spencer!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Go! NOW! Spencer!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Go! NOW! Spencer!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yanikka...! Even you'll die fighting that thing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yanikka...! Even you'll die fighting that thing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yanikka...! Even you'll die fighting that thing!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't die that easily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't die that easily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't die that easily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stay alive. And run when you get the chance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stay alive. And run when you get the chance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stay alive. And run when you get the chance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not getting through me, you monster!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not getting through me, you monster!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not getting through me, you monster!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Look at me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Look at me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Look at me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...?! It's super tough!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...?! It's super tough!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...?! It's super tough!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. Then I'll have to use my full power...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. Then I'll have to use my full power...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. Then I'll have to use my full power...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh... right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh... right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh... right.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Spencer told me not to use my Counter ability
8g

Spencer told me not to use my Counter ability
8g
